plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the search result for 'Playwright check suite' now links to a specific section of the page (#playwright-check-suite), causing the URL assertion to fail due to the unexpected hash fragment.
observedIndicators: Assertion mismatch on URL hash fragment
page.ai successfully reached the target content
Baseline and Failure screenshots show identical page content

remediationSteps.summary: Relax or update URL assertion to account for hash fragments.
remediationSteps.details: Update the test assertion on line 13 to either include the hash fragment '#playwright-check-suite' or use a less restrictive matcher like .toContain() or a regex.

plan.notes: The AI successfully completed the objective 'chose the match for Constructs > DETECT'. The website's search implementation returned a deep-link URL. The Playwright test script uses a strict equality check on the URL which does not account for hash fragments. Visuals confirm the correct page was reached. This is a persistent failure (streak of 8) indicating a stable change in the site's search result links.
